rationale: Both candidates independently found the diffusion-loader (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py:2238) still calling the removed get_cache_scale API, matching the latent gap check and effectively the '#4808 covers the DiT call site' point from ground truth. X pads this with two low-value nits (guard-collapsing style, test renaming) that add little. Y goes deeper, citing actual upstream vLLM source to justify the design, and raises a well-grounded, specific test-fidelity critique (the delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader and never proves the outer mapper actually renames scales) that closely echoes the human reviewer's core non-blocking concern about tests not proving real-checkpoint resolution. Both give concrete file/line actionable feedback, but Y's findings are more substantive and better aligned with what the ground-truth reviewer actually flagged.
